creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm seeing the same corruption of icons in Firefox with a radeon card on i386.  I updated FreeBSD head+drm-current-kmod from early November to early February.  No ports have been updated.

Jakub, when was the last time you updated FreeBSD stable and what version were you running before that?  Maybe the problem is caused by changes in linuxkpi.  I see many changes have been merged to stable in the past few weeks.
